topic: very late harvest and frost exposure

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes remain on the vine unusually late into autumn to gain ripeness or concentration.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The extended hang time overlaps with colder nights and a rising probability of frost.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: A frost can damage or freeze fruit before harvest, threatening yield and the intended style.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: A frost can damage or freeze fruit before harvest, threatening yield and the intended style.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
